useful_outputs: Exporter v0_2 + checker v0_1 for practical task-scoped guidance
Seven capability-scope packs with bounded forbidden actions
waste_points: Initial gate registry lacks U19/U20/U21 entries, requiring cross-policy reconciliation.
missing_tools: No dedicated pre-existing checker for task-scoped capability packs.
recommended_script_absorption: Absorb exporter/checker pair into standard Mechanicus taskpack pipeline.
recommended_narrow_agent_profiles: Mechanicus Scope-Pack Curator Servitor (task-type mapping + guard enforcement).
future_prompt_improvements: Attach explicit allowed/forbidden path list in TASK.json for each NewGen dossier to reduce admission ambiguity.
future_gate_or_checklist_recommendations: Add a formal registry entry for GATE-U19/U20/U21 to eliminate policy/registry drift.
